# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to create a VPC with public and private subnets 
              for our three-tier application, configure basic routing and internet gateway.
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ThreeTierAppVPC
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    
  VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      DhcpOptionsId: dopt-deadbeef   # This is an example. Replace with your actual DHCP options set ID.
      
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway  
  
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2c
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2d
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      
  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2e
      CidrBlock: 10.0.5.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      
  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2f
      CidrBlock: 10.0.6.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
